title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF EASTERN PANGASINAN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL TO EASTERN PANGASINAN GENERAL HOSPITAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4334 / 62 OG No. 18, 2964 (May 2, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4182, April 21, 1965 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF EASTERN PANGASINAN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL TO EASTERN PANGASINAN GENERAL HOSPITAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Eastern Pangasinan Emergency Hospital in the Municipality of Tayug, Province of Pangasinan, is hereby changed to Eastern Pangasinan General Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, April 21, 1965.
